candidate.name: Uman Mushtaq
candidate.summary: Node.js / NestJS Backend Engineer with 4+ years building production fintech and crypto platforms. Specialized in event-driven microservices (RabbitMQ, Kafka), payment-gateway integration (Stripe, PayPal), and TypeScript / PostgreSQL / Docker stacks. Based in Paris, legally authorized to work in France (APS visa, no sponsorship required). Open to remote EU roles, all French cities (Paris, Lyon, Marseille, Bordeaux, etc.), and relocation within Europe.

workAuthorization.statusLine: APS visa, no sponsorship required, eligible for fast changement de statut once contract signed.
workAuthorization.visaContext: French APS visa. Already legally resident in France, no overseas visa process required.

candidate.cvText:
=== CANDIDATE CV ===
Name: Uman Mushtaq | Email: umanmushtaq72@gmail.com | Phone: +33651995139
Location: Paris, Île-de-France, France
GitHub: github.com/umanmushtaq | LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/umanmushtaq

SKILLS:
Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript
Frameworks: NestJS, Express.js, React
Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis
Architecture: Microservices, Event-Driven Architecture, Domain-Driven Design (DDD), Clean Architecture, Hexagonal Architecture
Messaging: RabbitMQ (Saga pattern), Kafka (real-time event streaming)
DevOps/Cloud: Docker, AWS, GitHub Actions, CI/CD pipelines
Tools: Git, Sequelize, Mongoose, Nx Monorepo
Integrations: Stripe, PayPal, Auth0, Firebase, Twilio, SendGrid, Web3/Blockchain APIs

EXPERIENCE:
OptimusFox — Software Engineer | Oct 2021–Jul 2024 | Lahore, Pakistan
• Designed and delivered 3–5 production NestJS/TypeScript/Express.js microservices (fintech, crypto, SaaS)
• Integrated Stripe, PayPal payment gateways; Web3/blockchain APIs; Auth0/Firebase auth; Twilio/SendGrid
• Resolved critical data integrity issues by redesigning PostgreSQL and MongoDB schemas
• Set up GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines from scratch; Dockerized all backend services
• Cross-functional team of ~10 engineers; fintech payment flows and crypto trading platforms

Teams.pk — Node.js Developer | Jun 2020–Sep 2021 | Lahore, Pakistan
• Built and maintained REST APIs for a B2B SaaS platform using Node.js, TypeScript, Express.js
• Established clean architecture patterns from early-stage features through to stable production
• Debugging, performance improvements, feature delivery in a fast-moving startup

PROJECTS:
NexusPay (Apr 2026–present): High-performance event-driven fintech platform targeting 10,000+ TPS. Nx monorepo with 7 independent NestJS microservices (API Gateway, User, Wallet, Transaction, Notification, Analytics, Payment Gateway), each with dedicated PostgreSQL DB. RabbitMQ for Saga-based distributed transactions. Kafka for real-time event streaming. Clean/Hexagonal Architecture + DDD. Redis for caching, rate limiting, distributed locks. JWT + refresh token auth. Full KYC workflow. 85%+ test coverage (unit, integration, e2e). Docker + GitHub Actions CI/CD.
Swiss Block (Dec 2022–May 2023): Cryptocurrency exchange — BTC/ETH trading, wallet management, order execution. Secure REST API backend: Node.js, TypeScript, Express.js, PostgreSQL. Third-party market data APIs for live price feeds.
Dinisium (Mar 2022–Jul 2024): White-label marketplace for asset-backed cryptocurrency tokens. Role-based interfaces (super admin, admin, investor). Node.js, Express.js, PostgreSQL. Quorum blockchain mainnet integration for transaction auditability.
Aktoo (Jan 2024–Jul 2024): Actor training platform. Node.js, TypeScript, Express.js, PostgreSQL. Structured content delivery and user progress tracking.
Tracker Score (Jul–Nov 2022): Real-time sports scores for 28 sports. Node.js, TypeScript, Express.js, PostgreSQL. Third-party sports data API integration.

EDUCATION:
Paris School of Business — Master of Business Administration | Oct 2024–Jul 2025
University of Central Punjab — Bachelor of Computer Science | Oct 2015–Aug 2019

LANGUAGES: English (Fluent), French (A1, Improving)
VISA: French APS visa, no sponsorship required. Already legally resident in France. Employer files a standard changement de statut once a contract is signed — no overseas visa process required. Open to any city in France and relocation within the EU.
